name: ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Assessment
description: Assessment aligned to ISO/IEC 27001:2022 information security management requirements

sections.name: Context, Scope and Leadership
sections.description: Context, Scope and Leadership controls and practices.

questions.text: Is the ISMS scope documented, approved, and reviewed when business changes occur?

guidance.title: Is the ISMS scope documented, approved, and reviewed when business changes occur?
guidance.risk: If this is not in place, control reliability and compliance evidence may be weak.
actions: Define, implement, and evidence this control.

questions.text: Has top management approved information security policy and objectives?

guidance.title: Has top management approved information security policy and objectives?
guidance.risk: If this is not in place, control reliability and compliance evidence may be weak.
actions: Define, implement, and evidence this control.

questions.text: Are legal, regulatory, and contractual security requirements identified?

actions: Define, implement, and evidence this control.

questions.text: Are information security responsibilities assigned and communicated?

actions: Define, implement, and evidence this control.

questions.text: Are residual risks accepted by authorized management?
